channel.title: GOOG — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on GOOG (Alphabet Class C) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Seth Klarman: ADDED GOOG (+40%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Seth Klarman (Baupost Group) added GOOG in Q4 2025 · 5.2% of portfolio. Building out new Alphabet position.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Seth Klarman)

item.title: David Tepper: ADDED GOOG (+29%) · Q4 2025
item.description: David Tepper (Appaloosa Management) added GOOG in Q4 2025 · 8.1% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (David Tepper)

item.title: Tom Slater: ADDED GOOG (+29%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Tom Slater (Baillie Gifford (Long Term Global Growth)) added GOOG in Q4 2025 · 1.0% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Tom Slater)

item.title: Bill Nygren: TRIMMED GOOG (-19%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Bill Nygren (Oakmark Funds) trimmed GOOG in Q4 2025 · 0.4% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Bill Nygren)
